vulnerability.reference: Production houses automate restoration based on blind VQA scores without human oversight.
vulnerability.generated: Blind reliance on unverified no-reference VQA scores to automatically trigger reprocessing without adversarial robustness checks.

impact.reference: Wasted compute resources escalate costs and delay content delivery, risking contract penalties.
impact.generated: Unnecessary compute-heavy reprocessing wastes GPU resources, inflates operational costs, and delays media delivery pipelines.

dose_response.reference: Adversarial perturbations cause false quality drops that trigger unnecessary reprocessing, wasting compute resources and escalating costs, which risks contract penalties.
dose_response.generated: Adversarial perturbations that arbitrarily change no-reference VQA scores, when media production houses use blind VQA to trigger automated restorations, exploit blind reliance on unverified scores without robustness checks, leading to unnecessary GPU-intensive reprocessing that inflates costs and delays delivery.
